tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All fail-to-pass tests (test_ensureModelInfo_method_exists, test_modelInfoPromise_caching_field_exists, test_regex_null_check_fix, test_explicit_contextLength_respected, test_autodetect_returns_promise_resolve) exclusively use string/regex matching on file contents with patterns like 'assert "ensureModelInfo" in content' and re.search(). test_not_tautological.reason: Since tests only check for string presence in the file, an agent could pass all tests by simply appending a comment block containing all the required strings (e.g., '// private ensureModelInfo(): Promise<void> { modelInfoPromise explicitContextLength if (!parts || parts.length < 2) this.model === "AUTODETECT" return Promise.resolve() if (!this.explicitContextLength) { this._contextLength }') without implementing any actual fix.

anti_cheating_measures.reason: The solution is in /workspace/continue_repo accessible via solve.sh. The agent could read the gold patch from solution/solve.sh if it exists in the container. Additionally, since tests only check text patterns, the agent could grep test_outputs.py for the exact regex patterns being checked and insert matching strings without understanding the bug.
